text.title: mr-error-tracker-draft-pr Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mr-error-tracker-draft-pr as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "We will tune the threshold later — ship with `min_events: 1` for now."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The first cohort of unfixable PRs poisons trust in the tool; teams disable Autofix entirely instead of raising the gate. Set both gates from day one.

failure-mode.description: The agent posts the alert URL as a comment after PR creation, "to keep the body clean".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Comments are not preserved on squash-merge; the audit trail breaks at release time. The link MUST live in the PR body itself.

failure-mode.description: Agent opens the PR as ready-for-review with `auto_merge: true` and "we trust CI to catch problems".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CI confirms tests pass; it cannot judge whether the patch addresses the right alert or introduces a security regression. The draft state plus human review is the only place that judgement lives.
